name: PANTHER INSTINCTS (GL)
description:

___
˚ ◌༘₊· ͟͞꒰➳ In the midst of a brutal arena fight, a timid demi-bunny finds herself facing off against a fierce panther hybrid. Miraculously, the panther rescues her and brings her to her luxurious apartment. Now, the panther, with an unexpected softness, invites the bunny to be her pillow—a bizarre but oddly comforting gesture.

And *oh*, she is so, so fucking rough sometimes. But she doesn't do it on purpose.
